threats.attacker_capability: influence the agent (via injected docs/tools) to edit files beyond the task
threats.entry_vector: prompt injection in repository docs / tool output
preconditions: an approved task with a bounded write scope
detective_controls: scope gate diffs candidate against write_scope
threats.residual_risk: in-scope-but-wrong changes still require reviewer judgment

threats.attacker_capability: weaken assertions or disable collection to fake green
threats.entry_vector: candidate diff to test files or runner hooks
threats.residual_risk: novel tamper idioms not in the pattern list may need reviewer to catch

threats.attacker_capability: claim done without real, discriminating evidence
preconditions: a task the agent wants to close
threats.residual_risk: a test can be real yet incomplete; coverage is not proof of correctness

preventive_controls: no secret access at author tier
recovery_controls: reject candidate; rotate any exposed secret
threats.residual_risk: novel secret formats not matched by the format-anchored patterns

threats.attacker_capability: reach the network to retrieve solutions or exfiltrate
preventive_controls: isolation truth model fails closed for R2+
threats.residual_risk: ASSERTED isolation on a host without a namespace mechanism cannot be upgraded locally

threats.attacker_capability: escape the repository via symlink or path traversal
threats.entry_vector: candidate creates a symlink or traversing path
threats.residual_risk: TOCTOU races on shared filesystems are out of scope for the static gate

threats.attacker_capability: modify a policy/hook then rely on the weakened guardrail in the same run
threats.entry_vector: candidate diff to protected control-plane paths
preventive_controls: policies read at immutable ref, not working tree
ConfigChange hook blocks changes during a run
detective_controls: scope PROTECTED_PATH finding on writes and deletions
threats.residual_risk: control-plane change by an authorized human still needs independent review (dogfooding workflow)

threats.attacker_capability: mint a production VERIFIED from inside the author trust domain
preventive_controls: no production signing key in repo
detective_controls: verify_attestation trust-domain scoping and binding checks
threats.residual_risk: a compromised external verifier key is outside this repository's control

threats.attacker_capability: replay an attestation onto a different candidate, policy, or evidence
threats.residual_risk: clock skew handling depends on the relying party's trusted time source

threats.attacker_capability: promote a poisoned or self-approved lesson into active memory
detective_controls: content-hash integrity check on promote and lint
threats.residual_risk: a compromised curator identity could promote bad memory (out of scope for the author tier)

threats.attacker_capability: approve a candidate without binding to it or reviewing acceptance
threats.entry_vector: reviewer output not bound to the exact candidate
threats.residual_risk: two correlated reviewers can share a blind spot; evaluator-health monitors this

threats.attacker_capability: ship an unsafe migration/schema change or omit rollback
threats.entry_vector: candidate touching migrations/schema or a contract without rollback
preconditions: a task touching data or contracts
preventive_controls: rollout+rollback required in every feature contract
detective_controls: scope gate on out-of-scope migration/schema files
recovery_controls: automated rollback; staged rollout health gate
threats.residual_risk: data-loss risk of a semantically valid but destructive migration needs human/DBA review
